title: アオハル杯1戦目・ヴィクトリー！

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Viiictory! That was darn amazin', everyone!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Nothin' feels better than winnin' a race with
friends!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Let's have a party to celebrate our win! C'mon,
time to get all the fixin's we need for a big ol'
BBQ bash tonight!
